title: frenela robusta
intro: Frenela robusta, also known as Frenela officinalis, is a plant species that belongs to the family Lamiaceae. It is a medicinal plant that has been traditionally used for its numerous health benefits, primarily attributed to its essential oils, flavonoids, and phenolic acids. The plant is known to possess antimicrobial, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant properties, which contribute to its medicinal properties. Frenela robusta is used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures to aid in digestion, reduce stress, and promote overall well-being.
